title: Hatsune Miku Villagers
description: Turns the Villagers into Hatsune Miku
body:
(REQUIRES OPTIFINE)

This resource pack turns the Villagers into Miku — YIPEEE :D

She has different biome variants, inspired by real Miku appearances. Babies will have a bigger, cuter head, and Miku will have vanilla-style job textures while still keeping her iconic look.

The sounds have also been replaced with an AI cover of Miku imitating the Villager sounds.

Nitwit Villagers won’t be Miku, but instead a Villager cosplaying as her. Since he’s unemployed, I guess he’s got a lot of time for cosplaying lol.
